overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a snowy Japanese-inspired village with thermal hot springs. The character moves from a frozen waterfall area through a rocky ridge into a populated thermal district, wades through hot spring pools, and exits onto a narrow village street.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy rocky path approaching frozen waterfall

events.description: character reaches the base of a large cascading waterfall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a frozen path between wooden structures and snow-covered rocks toward a waterfall

entered.detail: snow-covered wooden building with barred windows and elevated walkway
icy water surface reflecting the overcast sky
large cascading waterfall flowing down rocky cliff face
large boulders blanketed in snow flanking the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snowy path between a wooden fortification on the left and snow-covered rocks on the right, approaching a large frozen waterfall in the distance. The environment is cold and desolate with no other people visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky ridge climb leading to village gate

events.description: character passes through stone gate into the thermal district

agents.ego_description: climbing up snow-covered rocky terrain and passing through a stone gate into a populated area

notable_agents.action: two villagers sitting on a wooden bench near a warming brazier

entered.detail: large stone entrance gate with wooden roof and hanging lanterns
metal fire pit with orange flames providing warmth
traditional Japanese building with lit windows and snow-covered roof

segments.scene_description: The character climbs up the rocky ridge to the right of the waterfall, passing through a stone gate into the Thermal District. Two NPCs sit near a brazier by the entrance as the character moves from the natural waterfall area into the built village environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: thermal district walkway with benches and lanterns

events.description: character descends stone stairs toward the thermal pool area

agents.ego_description: walking along a cobblestone path past villagers and descending toward the hot springs

notable_agents.action: villager in red clothing walking along the path

entered.detail: multi-story stone structure with wooden accents and lit windows
traditional stone lantern with glowing light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the populated thermal district, passing villagers sitting on benches and stone lanterns lining the path. The architecture shifts to stone buildings with wooden bridges as the character descends toward the steaming thermal pools.

scene_state.functional_zone: open thermal hot spring pools with rocky islands

events.description: character steps into the shallow thermal pool water

agents.ego_description: wading through the steaming thermal pool water between rocky outcrops

entered.detail: steaming hot spring water with rocky outcrops rising from the surface
traditional Japanese gate structure marking the pool entrance
tall tiered tower visible in the distance against the mountains

segments.scene_description: The character wades through the steaming thermal pools, surrounded by snow-covered rocks and traditional architecture. Steam rises from the water as the character moves toward a torii gate, with a pagoda spire visible in the distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village street with stone archway

events.description: character exits thermal pool and passes through stone archway into village street

agents.ego_description: exiting the water and walking through a covered stone archway into a narrow village street

entered.detail: covered stone passage with hanging icicles and wooden roof
narrow cobblestone street lined with traditional buildings
wooden market stall with canvas covering

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the thermal pools and passes through a stone archway with hanging icicles into a narrow village street. The environment shifts from open water to an enclosed cobblestone passage lined with wooden stalls and stone buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a desolate, frozen wilderness into the heart of a bustling thermal village. It begins along a narrow snowy path between a wooden fortification and jagged rocks, moving toward a massive frozen waterfall in the distance. As the camera climbs the rocky ridge and passes through a stone gate, the desolate landscape shifts into the Thermal District, where the presence of NPCs and stone lanterns signals a transition into a populated settlement. The scene then descends through stone architecture and wooden bridges into steaming thermal pools, where rising mist partially obscures a distant pagoda spire. Finally, the camera emerges from the warm waters and passes through an icicle-covered stone archway, transitioning from the open springs into a narrow, enclosed cobblestone street lined with wooden stalls.
